title: Fine Dining | #shorts
full_text: lunch was awesome right so I just want to point out to you that we ate the food was fine but you made me pay $17 for a apricot tart that was frozen it was straight out of a frozen container at the most expensive restaurant in New York City and you quote unquote begged me not to say anything and not to make a scene Z these New York restaurants is a privilege to eat there you have to deal with these things what are you what it was a frozen you couldn't we should be thankful they took us what are you talking about and meanwhile if I want to spend $15 on an Uber you freak out why are money wasted
